第一步不是說你想要甚麼。
第一步是聽對方想要甚麼。

The first step is not to speak, but to listen.
If you try to advertise democracy at a place where the people don’t want to listen, you will be counter-productive. To reach their hearts, you must first be their friend, listen to their complains, and help them accomplish their wishes.
It is not a matter of courage, but a matter of method.
